computed_from.note: PREMARKET RUN 08:30 ET 2026-06-15. Friday June 13 RTH bars not in 80-bar pull (total 303 available; next heartbeat should pull 300 to fill Friday history). Prior close estimated ~749-750 based on Monday premarket open at 750.55. All Active-tier June 8 levels expired (24h window). Only ROUND_740 Reference survived audit. 4 fresh levels added from today premarket.

levels.label: PMH_2026-06-15
levels.reasoning: Today's premarket high (08:15 ET approx). First ceiling resistance above open. Break + 5m close above = bull trigger candidate. Rejection = bear setup elevated.
levels.notes: ~$1.05 above current price 751.04. Premarket range was 748.00-752.09.

levels.label: ROUND_750
levels.reasoning: Round $750 level, $1.04 below current price. Psychological magnet. Also coincides with Monday premarket consolidation base — price bounced from 748 low toward 750+ all premarket. Not a trigger source but a soft support/resistance reference.
levels.notes: Heartbeat does not treat as trigger source. Awareness only.

levels.label: PML_2026-06-15
levels.reasoning: Today's premarket low (first 04:00 ET bar low). Key floor. Loss of 748.00 on 5m close = bear setup eligible: BEARISH_REJECTION / ribbon-BEAR. Hold + bounce = bull continuation.
levels.notes: ~$3.04 below current price. SPY opened premarket at 750.55 with initial spike to 751.30 and low of 748.00.

levels.label: CARRY_SESSION_HIGH_2026-06-08
levels.reasoning: June 8 session high (prior anchor). SPY has now moved ~$6 above this level. Acts as carry support on any significant retrace — breakdowns below 745.33 would signal bear continuation. Reference on any pullback >$5 from current price.
levels.notes: ~$5.71 below current. Carry level — engine does not score as active trigger unless price returns to this zone.

levels.label: ROUND_740
levels.reasoning: Round $740 level. Now ~$11 below current price. Psychological awareness only — deep support on any major selloff. Not a trigger source.
levels.notes: Kept from prior session audit — long-lived Reference tier.

prior_session.ah_note: Friday June 13 RTH bars not in the 80-bar pull. Thursday June 12 extended hours close was ~742.36. Monday premarket opened at 750.55 (gap up ~$8-9 from Thursday). Friday close estimated ~749-750. Next heartbeat should pull count=300 to recover Friday session history.

session_bias.reasoning: SPY gapped up ~$9 from Thursday close ~742 to premarket 750+. VIX 16.60 declining from last week's 19.16 (MID regime, fear subsiding). Clean macro day (no events today). Premarket consolidation 748-752 suggests bull continuation setup on PMH 752.09 break. FOMC Wednesday creates medium-term caution but today's tape is constructive.

audit_log.note: PREMARKET AUDIT 2026-06-15 08:30 ET. 6 levels dropped: 5 Active-tier expired (24h window, verified 2026-06-08), 1 Reference expired (2026-06-12).
